altText: An orange jewelweed trumpet with red freckles, hanging like an earring
A jewelweed flower face-on, showing its freckled orange mouth
Jewelweed flowers and buds dangling among the leaves
A fat jewelweed seed pod resting on a leaf — ready to pop
Jewelweed pods, one already sprung into a tight coil
Blue-green toothed jewelweed leaves that make rain bead like jewels
A jewelweed leaf up close with its soft-toothed edge
A leafy jewelweed patch in the damp shade
A jewelweed plant with flowers hanging on thread-thin stalks
A bumblebee flying in to visit a jewelweed flower
